Encoded date range as 12-digit bigint (YYYYMMDDMMDD). First 8 digits are the FromDate (YYYYMMDD); last 4 digits are the ToDate month-day suffix (MMDD, typically 1231 for Dec 31). current_comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)
best_sibling_cell: Instrument name from Dim_Instrument.Name (aliased as Symbol in SP). For stocks: ticker notation (e.g., AAPL). For some instruments, differs from the standard Symbol field. (Tier 2 — SP_Stocks_HS125, DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.Name)

current_comment: Indicates whether an instrument ID related to SQF exists, assigned 1 if an InstrumentID is present, otherwise 0.
best_sibling_cell: CASE WHEN adj.InstrumentID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE GroupID = 59, joined on dis.DateID >= adj.DateID (adj carries @dateInt as DateID)

current_comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.
best_sibling_cell: Position identifier. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. HASH distribution key. DWH note: for ActionTypeID=36 + CompensationReasonID IN (117,118), extracted from Description field via reverse string parsing with TRY_CAST fallback. COALESCE prefers Dim_Position. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl) (via BI_DB_Fact_Customer_Action_Position_Distribution)

current_comment: Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

current_comment: Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).
best_sibling_cell: FK to Trade.Mirror. 0/NULL = manual. Positive = copy-trade position. (All rows in this table have MirrorID > 0, MirrorTypeID = 4.) (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Position via Trade.PositionTbl)

current_comment: Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.
best_sibling_cell: DateID when position opened; equals @dateID for inserted rows. Clustered index column. (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_Report, #relPos2.OpenDateID)

current_comment: Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.
best_sibling_cell: YYYYMMDD integer of the position close date. For regular positions: from Dim_Position.CloseDateID (matches @DateID). For copy positions: from Dim_Mirror.CloseDateID. Use CAST(CAST(CloseDateID AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE) to convert. (Tier 2 — Dim_Position wiki, SP_Dim_Position_DL_To_Synapse)

current_comment: Leader customer ID. The user whose trades are copied. Trade.GetActiveCopiersForParents filters by ParentCID. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)
best_sibling_cell: The CopyTrader parent customer ID from etoroGeneral_History_GuruCopiers. Clustered index column. Only non-PI parents (GuruStatusID IN (0,1) or NULL) with AUM > $15,000 and active copiers. (Tier 2 -SP_NonPI_HighAUM, etoroGeneral_History_GuruCopiers.ParentCID)

reason: medium; no clear win uc r=2
current_comment: Leader username at mirror creation. Denormalized for display; Trade.RegisterMirror passes from caller. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)
best_sibling_cell: Leader username at mirror creation. Denormalized for display; Trade.RegisterMirror passes from caller. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Mirror via Trade.Mirror)

current_comment: 1=Regular, 2=CopyMe, 3=Social Index, 4=Fund (Dictionary.MirrorType). Determines mirror behavior. (Tier 1 - Trade.Mirror)
best_sibling_cell: 1=Regular, 2=CopyMe, 3=Social Index, 4=Fund (Dictionary.MirrorType). Always 4 in this table — the SP filters WHERE MirrorTypeID=4. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Mirror via Trade.Mirror)

current_comment: Flag: 1=created by partial close. ALWAYS filter ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0 when counting positions.
best_sibling_cell: 1=this position is the child (remainder) of a partial close event. Generally filter out child positions from most metrics on OPEN when aggregating, but not all (e.g., volume is already pro-rated so excluding these is wrong). NEVER filter these out on CLOSE. ISNULL(Dim_Position.IsPartialCloseChild, 0). (Tier 5 — Trade.PositionTbl via Dim_Position)

current_comment: Date of the action as integer YYYYMMDD. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes. (Tier 2 - ETL-computed)
best_sibling_cell: Reporting (int yyyymmdd) = @dateInt = CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), @date, 112) AS INT) ; delete/reinsert key (DELETE WHERE DateID = @dateID). (Tier 2 — BI_DB_dbo.SP_DDR_Customer_Periodic_Status) (via BI_DB_DDR_Customer_Periodic_Status)

Event datetime. For KPI='FTDs': FTD timestamp (Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate — the deposit approval datetime). For KPI='Registration': registration datetime (Customer.CustomerStatic.Registered). Historical rows carry the original event timestamp from BI_DB_LiveAcquisitionDashboard_Daily. (Tier 2 — etoro.Customer.Customer.Registered / etoro.Billing.Deposit.ModificationDate)

current_comment: Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Each customer has one real CID. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID of the Popular Investor when ItemType='User'. NULL when ItemType='Instrument'. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)
CASE WHEN Side = 'B' THEN 1 WHEN Side = 'S' THEN 4 END
Type of financial action from DWH_dbo.Dim_ActionType.Name. Only Deposit (ActionTypeID=7) and Cashout (ActionTypeID=8) are included. (Tier 2 — SP_eMoney_Daily_MIMO via Dim_ActionType)

From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. ISNULL(...,-1) masks NULL account-level feeds. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

Settlement type classification: 'Real' = settled stock ownership position (IsSettled=1 or HedgeServerID IN (9,102,112,125,126) for LP side), 'CFD' = contract-for-difference. Client-side uses Dim_PositionChangeLog correction (ChangeTypeID=13) to recover the IsSettled value AS OF the report date before any subsequent changes. (Tier 2 -SP_HedgeCost)

CASE WHEN MirrorID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END from revenue TVFs, then ISNULL(...,-1); crypto-to-fiat branch forces -1 post UPDATE. Indicates copy-trading linkage on applicable metrics. (Tier 2 — Fact_CustomerAction.MirrorID logic via Function_Revenue_*)
Canonical revenue column label (FullCommission, RollOverFee, TransferCoinFee, StakingLagOneMonth, …) — enumerated in Dim_Revenue_Metrics.Metric. (Tier 2 — SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

DDR branch: SUM(ga.Amount) grouped after WHERE ga.DateID BETWEEN @sdateInt AND @edateInt AND ga.Metric <> 'StakingLagOneMonth' (staking lag rows excluded from this union part). Staking branch: SUM(frsf.TotalUSDDistributed) from Function_Revenue_StakingFee(@sdateInt,@edateInt) with @OnlyValidCustomers filter on frsf.IsValidCustomer
COUNT/SUM amalgamation counting instrumented actions per grain; ISNULL(...,0) enforced on insert (ShareLending/Staking may collapse NULL counts). (Tier 2 — SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

True if this metric contributes to the canonical "Total Revenue" rollup; False for raw/pass-through entries (Commission, Dividends, SDRT). Filter on this when computing top-line revenue to avoid double-counting. SP_DDR post-processing forces Metric='SDRT' rows to 0 even if dictionary flipped historically. Stored as int mirror of Dim_Revenue_Metrics bit semantics. (Tier 1 — UC sample)

CASE WHEN ActionTypeID IN (1,39) AND ISNULL(IsAirDrop,0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END on commission feeders; flattened to 0 elsewhere before insert coercion. (Tier 2 — SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

1 Long 0 Short; NULL ⇒ non-trade row sentinel — widened/truncated via ISNULL(...,-1) with dividend amount-based overrides (Metric='Dividends') and CryptoToFiatFee sentinel -1 path. (Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl)
CASE WHEN frfc.Leverage > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END. Derived from position Leverage: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type. (Tier 2 — Trade.PositionTbl)
1=futures contract (instrument in Trade.InstrumentGroups WHERE GroupID=25), 0=not futures. 243 flagged as futures. ISNULL(frfc.IsFuture,0) in SP. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument)
Smart Portfolio / Fund position flag from TVF: CASE WHEN cpt.PositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END with LEFT JOIN BI_DB_CopyFund_Positions. ISNULL(...,0) in SP. (Tier 2 — Function_PnL_Single_Day)
CASE WHEN PositionID matched THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CASE WHEN PositionID matched THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
ETL ISNULL(Recurring.IsRecurring,0) from OUTER APPLY (SELECT 1 AS IsRecurring FROM etoro_Billing_RecurringDeposit WHERE DepositID=d.DepositID) Recurring. (Tier 2 — Billing.RecurringDeposit)

Flag from Fact_CustomerAction for the position open action (ActionTypeID=1). Always 1 for C2P positions — positions opened via AdminPositionLog CompensationReasonID=134 (Crypto Transfer) are classified as AirDrop by the Dealing system. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_C2F_E2E)
CASE WHEN adj.InstrumentID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE GroupID = 59, joined on dis.DateID >= adj.DateID (adj carries @dateInt as DateID)
CASE WHEN V_C2P_Positions.PositionID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END on position-backed paths; ISNULL packaging for non-position metrics. (Tier 2 — BI_DB_dbo.V_C2P_Positions)

COALESCE(dp.IsMarginTrade, upl.IsMarginTrade) (sql-derived [coalesce, DIVERGENT] from Function_PnL_Single_Day); branches: CASE WHEN dp.SettlementTypeID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END OR CASE WHEN bdppl.SettlementTypeID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END; where dp = DWH_dbo.Dim_Position, bdppl = BI_DB_dbo.BI_DB_PositionPnL

current_comment: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)
best_sibling_cell: Global Customer ID of the wallet owner. For customer wallets (type 5), this is the real user. For system wallets (types 1-4, 6-7), this is a service account. Gcid=0 conventionally indicates omnibus/system wallets. From Wallet.Wallets.Gcid. DWH note: WHERE GCID>0 filter in SP excludes unoccupied pool wallets and omnibus wallets — all GCIDs in this table belong to real customers. (Tier 1 — WalletDB.Wallet.CustomerWalletsView)

current_comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Universal customer identifier across all eToro tables.
best_sibling_cell: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. COALESCE(POB.RealCID, TIN.RealCID). From Dim_Customer.RealCID. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)

current_comment: Unique identifier for the FTD platform.
wiki_cell: Primary key. Numeric identifier for the eToro sub-platform on which a customer made their First Time Deposit. Values: 1=TradingPlatform, 2=Options, 3=eMoney, 4=MoneyFarm. Sourced from MoneyBusDB.Dictionary.AccountTypes as the account type identifier. In CustomerFinanceDB, this field is named AccountTypeId. (Tier 3 — live data sampling, MoneyBusDB.Dictionary.AccountTypes)
best_sibling_cell: 3 eMoney / 1 TP (OLD) or Dim_Customer.FTDPlatformID (NEW)

current_comment: Platform name based on FTDPlatformID, where 1 maps to TradingPlatform, 2 to Options, 3 to eMoney, and 4 to MoneyFarm, otherwise defaults to Name.
best_sibling_cell: Human-readable account type label. Maps to Dictionary.AccountType.AccountTypeName in production (renamed in DWH). Used in reporting to display account classification. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.AccountType)

current_comment: Primary key from Trade.Instrument. Identifies the tradeable instrument pair. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: etig.InstrumentID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Composite instrument identifier. CASE WHEN eToroInstrumentID >= 100000 THEN eToroInstrumentID ELSE CryptoId END. For eToro-mapped instruments, equals eToroInstrumentID; for crypto-native instruments, equals CryptoID. Not a direct FK to EXW_Currency.Instruments. (Tier 2 — EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes / EXW_Wallet.CryptoMarketRatesMappings)

current_comment: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.InstrumentTypeID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: From IMD (InstrumentMetaData). Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto. FK to Dictionary.CurrencyType. ISNULL(...,-1) masks NULL account-level feeds. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument)

current_comment: ETL-computed asset class label. CASE on InstrumentTypeID: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else Other. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.InstrumentType. (T2 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Asset class or copy-trade category. For regular positions: Dim_Instrument.InstrumentType text label (8 InstrumentTypeID-driven values: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies). For copy positions: 'Copy Trade' (MirrorTypeID≠4) or 'Copy Portfolio' (MirrorTypeID=4). Distribution: Stocks 36.8%, Indices 18.8%, Commodities 17.1%, Crypto Currencies 16.2%, Currencies 6.1%, ETF 4.0%, Copy Trade 0.8%, Copy Portfolio 0.2%. (Tier 2 — SP_PositionHoldingTime + Dim_Instru

current_comment: Display name computed by Trade.GetInstrument as BuyCurrency Abbreviation + '/' + SellCurrency Abbreviation (e.g., EUR/USD for forex, AAPL/USD for stocks). Not a company name; see InstrumentDisplayName for human-readable labels. (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.Name. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Human-readable account type label. Maps to Dictionary.AccountType.AccountTypeName in production (renamed in DWH). Used in reporting to display account classification. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.AccountType)

current_comment: Alias of InstrumentID (InstrumentID AS DWHInstrumentID). Always equals InstrumentID. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.DWHInstrumentID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Always equal to InstrumentID — redundant copy following the DWH DWH{X}ID pattern. Use InstrumentID for all JOINs. Filtered to >0 (excludes placeholder). (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument wiki, originally Trade.Instrument)

current_comment: Hardcoded to 1 for all data rows; NULL for sentinel row (InstrumentID=0). (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.StatusID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: FK to EXW_Dictionary.TransactionStatus. 0=Pending, 1=Confirmed, 2=Verified, 3=Error, 4=Timeout, 5=PermanentError, 6=WavedError. Typical lifecycle: Pending → Confirmed → Verified. Recent distribution (2026): Pending 47%, Verified 47%, Confirmed 6%, Error/Timeout/WavedError/PermanentError <1%. (Tier 3 — WalletDB.Wallet.ReceivedTransactionStatuses)

current_comment: Buy-side currency abbreviation. For forex: base currency code; for stocks: the asset code (BuyCurrencyID=InstrumentID). Inherited from Trade.Instrument (Tier 1 - Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.BuyCurrencyID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: The buy-side asset of the instrument pair. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency(CurrencyID). For forex: the base currency. For stocks/ETFs/crypto: the asset's own CurrencyID in Dim_Currency (BuyCurrencyID = InstrumentID for stocks). (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument wiki, Trade.Instrument)

current_comment: FK to Dictionary.Currency. Sell-side (denomination) currency. For forex: quote currency; for stocks: trading currency. Inherited from Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.SellCurrencyID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: The sell-side (denomination) currency. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Currency(CurrencyID). For forex: the quote currency (e.g., USD in EUR/USD). For stocks: the trading denomination currency (USD, EUR, GBX). (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument wiki, Trade.Instrument)

current_comment: Trading symbol / ticker for the buy-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "AAPL.US". UNIQUE constraint in production. The primary identifier used in UIs and APIs. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via buy-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.BuyCurrency. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Crypto asset ticker symbol identifying the specific cryptocurrency being reported (e.g., 'BTC', 'ETH', 'ADA', 'XRP', 'SOL', 'DOGE', 'LTC', 'LINK', 'XLM', 'TRX'). From Dim_Instrument.BuyCurrency for instruments filtered to InstrumentTypeID=10. 120+ distinct values. (Tier 2 — SP_CryptoDashboard)

current_comment: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.SellCurrency. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Trading symbol / ticker for the sell-side currency. "USD", "EUR", "GBX". UNIQUE constraint in production. Passthrough from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation via sell-side join. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: Allowed trade range (pip distance) for pending orders. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.TradeRange. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Allowed trade range (pip distance) for pending orders. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.DollarRatio. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Price scaling factor. Most=1; JPY pairs=100. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument)

best_sibling_cell: Max pip difference for price validation. From Trade.Instrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument. Stored as int (original production type is bit). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.IsMajorID. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: 1=major instrument (spread/margin treatment); 0=minor. From Trade.Instrument. Stored as int (original production type is bit). (Tier 1 — Trade.GetInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: ETL-computed label from IsMajorID: 'Yes' when IsMajor=1, 'No' otherwise. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.IsMajor. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: ETL-computed label from IsMajorID: 'Yes' when IsMajor=1, 'No' otherwise. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument)

current_comment: ETL housekeeping timestamp. Set to GETDATE() at each SP_Dim_Instrument run. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.UpdateDate. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Timestamp when this crypto asset was first added to the wallet (maps to WalletDB.Wallet.WalletAssets.Occurred). Despite the name, this is a wallet creation/association timestamp — not the ETL run time. CAST from datetime2(7) to datetime. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_InternalWallet; renamed from Occurred)

current_comment: ETL housekeeping timestamp. Set to GETDATE() at each SP_Dim_Instrument run. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.InsertDate. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Migration load timestamp. All 9 rows are NULL - this column was populated as varchar(50) in the DWH_Migration staging DDL but the values were not carried over (or were NULL in the legacy DWH SQL Server source). Not useful for row age determination. (Tier 2 - DWH_Migration.Dim_ContractType DDL + Tier 3 live data)

current_comment: Human-readable name shown in UI (e.g., "Apple", "EUR/USD"). Used in position displays, order forms, and APIs. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.InstrumentDisplayName. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. Passthrough from DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.InstrumentDisplayName. (Tier 2 — SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

current_comment: Industry sector label from IMD (e.g., Technology, Consumer Goods). NULL for forex/crypto. From Trade.InstrumentMetaData. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData) (via Dim_Instrument). Source: isn.Industry. (T1 — Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched)
best_sibling_cell: Industry sector label from IMD (e.g., Technology, Consumer Goods). NULL for forex/crypto. From Trade.InstrumentMetaData. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData) (via Dim_Instrument)

best_sibling_cell: Extended company/instrument description. Nullable. (Tier 1 — Trade.InstrumentMetaData) (via Dim_Instrument)

best_sibling_cell: Exchange name, e.g. "Nasdaq", "NYSE", "Sydney", "Borsa Italiana". From Dim_Instrument.Exchange. Drives settlement-date logic (T+1 for NYSE/Nasdaq/TSX, T+2 for others). (Tier 2 -SP_Finance_Non_US_Settlement_2025, Dim_Instrument.Exchange)

best_sibling_cell: Flag indicating if the instrument is currently tradable. CAST from production bit. An instrument may exist but be non-tradable due to regulatory, market, or operational reasons. (Tier 1 — DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument wiki)

best_sibling_cell: Instrument name from Dim_Instrument.Name (aliased as Symbol in SP). For stocks: ticker notation (e.g., AAPL). For some instruments, differs from the standard Symbol field. (Tier 2 — SP_Stocks_HS125, DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument.Name)

best_sibling_cell: Percentage of position that can use bonus credit. From Trade.ProviderToInstrument. (Tier 1 — Trade.ProviderToInstrument) (via Dim_Instrument)
